description_long: This apartment building features a rectangular, elongated structure with a flat roof and a beige exterior. The front facade includes a main entrance with a small covered porch, potted plants, and a pathway leading to the door, as well as several windows and a balcony above the entrance. The sides of the building are mostly solid with minimal window openings, while the rear features a large garage door and additional windows. The roof is flat and the building appears to be two stories tall, with a clear internal layout visible from above. The landscaping at the front includes a small patch of grass and flower beds, adding a touch of greenery to the urban setting. The overall design is clean and modern, with simple lines and functional elements.
description: A modern, rectangular two-story apartment building with a beige facade, flat roof, and a landscaped front entrance featuring windows, a balcony, and a garage at the rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, windows, and landscaped area with plants and pathway.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a mostly solid beige wall with a single horizontal window and minimal exterior features.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a large garage door, additional windows, and the back of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a similar solid beige wall and a horizontal window, mirroring the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with a mix of single and grouped windows, while the sides have minimal, horizontally aligned windows.
